message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The printf string is split across two lines due to the literal newline in the format string. Need to fix this by replacing the broken printf with a working one.",
  "plan": "Use Python script to fix the broken printf line in w_wad.c, then rebuild and test.",
  "commands": [
    {"keystrokes": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
data = open('/app/doomgeneric/doomgeneric/w_wad.c').read()
old = 'printf("WAD header: %.4s numlumps=%d infotableofs=%d\n", header.identification, header.numlumps, header.infotableofs);'
new = 'printf("WAD header: numlumps=%%d infotableofs=%%d\n", (int)header.numlumps, (int)header.infotableofs);'
data = data.replace(old, new)
open('/app/doomgeneric/doomgeneric/w_wad.c', 'w').write(data)
print('Fixed')
PYEOF
", "duration": 0.5},
    {"keystrokes": "sed -n '185,190p' /app/doomgeneric/doomgeneric/w_wad.c
", "duration": 0.1}
  ]
}
